verses.text: God bids a new census of those able for war. Census. A new generation is counted.
God bids a new census of those able for war. Census. A new generation is counted.

Reuben's families are numbered. Reuben. The first tribe is counted.

Korah's company perished, 'notwithstanding the children of Korah died not.' Mercy. God spared the rebel's line.

Zelophehad had no sons, but five daughters. Daughters. A note that shapes a later law.

The total is six hundred one thousand seven hundred thirty. The total. A new host stands ready.
The land is to be divided by lot, by number. By lot. Inheritance is fairly shared.

The Levites are numbered by their families. Levites. They are counted apart.

Their number is twenty-three thousand, with no land inheritance. No inheritance. The LORD is their portion.

None remain of the first census but Caleb and Joshua. Fulfilled. The faithless generation is gone.
